justification: Both extractions are identical — they blindly copy all 80+ self-reported skills without any conservatism filtering, despite the candidate only demonstrating Python and Java in trivial beginner projects. Neither output classifies projects or captures impact highlights. Both fail equally on skill_accuracy and conservatism, and are neutral on the remaining dimensions due to absence of projects/metrics in the extraction. A tie is warranted here because the outputs are literally the same.
